ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 deducted from your account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We want to inform you that a transaction of ₹5,000 has been debited from your Standard Bank account on 07-Apr-2026 at 10:32 AM.

•  Transaction ID: SB123456789
•  Payee: ABC Pvt. Ltd.
•  Account Credited: 9988776655

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you did not authorize this deduction, please contact our 24/7 support immediately by calling 1800-123-456 or visit <URL> to secure your account.

Thank you for banking with us.

Regards,
Standard Bank – Customer Care

spam.subject: Urgent: Action Required – FedEx Delivery Fee Overdue
spam.body:
Hello,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx shipment (Tracking #FDX987654321) was not delivered on the scheduled date. As per our policy, a missed delivery fee of ₹800 is now due.

To avoid cancellation of your package, please resolve this fee within 48 hours by logging into your account at <URL> and making the payment.

Failure to pay will result in the cancellation of the shipment and forfeiture of the goods. Act now to secure your delivery.

Thank you,
FedEx Customer Service
